title: Tetra x Better Combat Patch
description: A simple datapack that gives the vanilla Tetra modules better combat functionality.
body:
This datapack allows using better combat's attack animation logic alongside tetra's modular tool items. It does this by using a crafting effect for each vanilla module in base Tetra.


**This datapack does not support any of Tetra's addon mods by itself, but shouldn't be directly incompatible either**

~~**Due to a problem with Minecraft NBT, and by extension Better Combat, this datapack / mod does not work correctly in multiplayer.**~~

Turns out someone made a fix, which can be found here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat-nbt-fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat-nbt-fix)
